ppbl.term.condition.title: FD Redemption in Payment Gateway T&C
ppbl.term.understand: I hereby understand and agree to the terms and conditions contained herein below and on
ppbl.tnc.STEP1: I hereby provide my consent for liquidation of my fixed deposit held with the partner bank for fulfilling my payment instructions.
ppbl.tnc.STEP2: I understand and agree and provide consent to PPBL to liquidate such fixed deposits as may be required to complete the transaction initiated by me.
ppbl.tnc.STEP3: I understand that the amounts shall be transferred from the partner bank to my Savings Account with PPBL and thereafter the same shall be settled towards the transaction amount.
ppbl.tnc.STEP4: I understand that the Savings Account shall be debited for only the amount payable towards the fulfillment completion of transaction and a fresh and specific consent shall be required towards every instance of payment instruction in relation to for every new transactions undertaken from time to time.
ppbl.tnc.STEP5: I understand and agree that if the redemption of the FD happens post failure/rejection/decline of the transaction request at the payment gateways end and/or the transaction requests is not processed by the payment gateway for any reason, then the amount so liquidated from the FD shall be credited in my Savings Account.

upi.help.title: How does it work?
upi.paymode.label: UPI
upi.whatIsVpaIdAndNumericId: What is VPA ID and UPI Number ?
upi.paytmLinkedPhoneNoError: Phone Number not linked to Paytm VPA, Try Again
upi.verifyPaytmMobNumber: Please enter a valid Mobile Number
upi.Enter8to10digitNid: UPI Number can be 8 to 10 digit length only
upi.vpaOnlyNumbers: Only numbers to be entered for UPI Number
upi.verifyUPINumber: Please enter a valid UPI Number
upi.verifyVPAID: Please enter a valid VPA of the form username@bank
upi.vpaContent2: Virtual Payment Address (VPA) acts as a unique identifier that can be used for all transactions made via the UPI system through a mobile app that is UPI-enabled.
upi.vpaContent3: It acts as an ID independent of your bank account number and other details. You need not fill in your bank account details repeatedly for making multiple payments.
upi.vpaContent4: What is the format of a VPA?
upi.vpaContent5: A typical VPA looks something like abc@bankname. Generally, a primary default VPA will be set by the UPI app you are working on. The 'abc' part of the above example can be anything, such as your name, your registered mobile number etc. The 'bank name' in the example can be the name of the bank your account is held with, or the name of the bank the app is associated with, or just the word 'upi'.
upi.vpaContent6: Is it possible to link multiple bank accounts to one VPA?
upi.vpaContent7: Yes. This is possible. The same VPA can be linked to different bank accounts.
upi.vpaContent8: If I have an existing VPA can I link the same to a new app?
upi.vpaContent9: Yes. However, this will depend on the app you are using to make the payment or initiate the fund transfer.
upi.vpaContent10: Will my VPA expire if I do not use it?
upi.vpaContent11: Even if you do not use it for a set period of time, it will not expire.
upi.vpaContent12: Is any other bank account information required if you are using VPA?
upi.vpaContent13: No. Just the VPA is required.
upi.numericIdContent2: Numeric UPI ID / UPI Number is an 8 to 11 digit unique number mapped to a VPA (Virtual Payment Address).
upi.numericIdContent3: What is the format of the UPI Number?
upi.numericIdContent4: UPI Number should be unique across the entire UPI user base for all the PSPs. The user can create a custom Numeric ID from 8 to 9 digits. However, incase of 10 digits (and when mobile number is extended to 11 digits), the sender/receiver will be allowed to set only their own mobile number.
upi.numericIdContent5: What is the purpose of UPI Number?
upi.numericIdContent6: UPI Number makes UPI Payments easier for feature-phone users due to faster key-in. UPI Number also makes Phone-Number based payments interoperable across PSPs.
upi.numericIdContent7: How do we create a UPI Number?
upi.numericIdContent8: The PSP (Payment Service Provider) app will seed your mobile number into the UPI ID Mapper database of NPCI to facilitate payments using the mobile number. Users will be informed of the same.
upi.numericIdContent9: Since a mobile number can be mapped to only one PSP app, a custom 8 or 9-digit number is to be set with other PSPs where the user has UPI payments set up. PSPs will provide a feature to create a custom UPI Number on the app.
upi.numericIdContent10: Is it mandatory to create a Numeric UPI ID?
upi.numericIdContent11: User can opt out or decline consent to seeding the mobile number into the UPI ID Mapper database of NPCI.
upi.numericIdContent12: Creating a custom 8 or 9-digit UPI Number is voluntary.
upi.numericIdContent13: Can a user map a single UPI Number with multiple VPAs?
upi.numericIdContent15: Can a user have multiple UPI Numbers for a single VPA?
upi.numericIdContent17: What are the conditions to modify the UPI Number mapping?
upi.numericIdContent18: When a mobile number is used as a UPI Number, then the same can be linked to a single VPA only, at any instance.
upi.numericIdContent19: If a user intends to map the same mobile number with another PSP's VPA, then the user will have to use the overwrite functionality which will need user validation of the last successful seeded UPI PSP.
upi.numericIdContent20: The overwrite functionality will not be permitted for custom UPI Number of 8 to 9 digits
upi.numericIdContent21: Can we deregister a Number ID?
upi.numericIdContent22: Yes. Any UPI Number upon deregistration, will not be allowed by NPCI to be used for a period of 6 months. Same user can reuse the UPI Number within this period.

appInvoke.cancelPayment.reason.other.placeholder: Please let us know about the reason
appInvoke.cancelPayment.reason.other.required: Please provide cancel reason in brief!
appInvoke.feeback.complete.heading: Thank you for your feedback
appInvoke.feeback.complete.subheading: Your feeddback helps us serve you better
appInvoke.feeback.complete.footer: Please wait while we take you back

bankTransfer.tnc.label: View Terms & Conditions
bankTransfer.tnc.heading: Terms & Conditions
bankTransfer.nonLoggedIn.heading: Enter Mobile number to get account details for payment
bankTransfer.otp.heading: Enter OTP sent to mobile no. {number}
bankTransfer.howToPay: How to pay NEFT / RTGS / IMPS
bankTransfer.confirm.copied: Please make sure you have copied the Bank Account Details before proceeding to the merchant website.
bankTransfer.vanInfoText: You will be provided a bank account number. Transfer the exact order amount from your internet banking portal or physical bank branch to complete the payment.
bankTransfer.tnc.point1: Transfer the exact order amount up to two decimal places.
bankTransfer.tnc.point2: Do not split the order amount into multiple payments.
bankTransfer.tnc.point3: Additional transfer charges (if any) are dependent on your bank.
bankTransfer.tnc.point4: You can also go to your physical bank branch to make the payment.
bankTransfer.tnc.point5: The bank account number is applicable for this order only.
bankTransfer.help.step.one: Login to Internet Banking Portal with your Bank User ID and Password.
bankTransfer.help.step.two: Add Bank Account Number issued for payment as a new beneficiary. Make a payment of exact order amount post beneficiary addition.
bankTransfer.help.step.three: Choose one of the three NEFT, RTGS or IMPS to complete the payment. Use IMPS or RTGS for instant payment to merchant.

van.heading: To complete the payment...
van.vanInfosubText: using NEFT / RTGS / IMPS to below bank account by
van.step1: Login to Internet Banking Portal with your bank user ID and password
van.step2: Add Bank account number and IFSC displayed above
van.step3: Choose one of the three IMPS, NEFT or RTGS to complete the payment. Use IMPS or RTGS for instant payment to merchant.

warningMessage.title: Safety Tip
warningMessage.content: Please ensure you are paying only to a trusted merchant

merchantLimitExtendedeAlert.headerText: Merchant has exhausted their payment acceptance limit
merchantLimitExtendedeAlert.innerText: We are sorry for this inconvenience, please try again later

coft.heading: Save card as per latest RBI guidelines
coft.title.desc: We need your consent to save your card as per RBI's latest guidelines before September 30, 2022.
coft.list.point1: The security of your card details will be enhanced by saving them with {cardScheme}.
coft.list.point2: You would not be required to enter complete card details every time you pay.
coft.list.point3: You can delete your card from the Payment Settings Section in Paytm App.
coft.saved.card.title: Save my card as per latest RBI guidelines
coft.saved.card.head: Save card as per latest RBI guidelines
coft.saved.new.card: Enter card details on next screen to complete this transaction as payment processing is not available on this saved card.
coft.list.mainheading: Why save your card for future payments?
coft.list.text1: No need to enter complete card details next time you pay.
coft.list.text2: 4 out of 5 customers prefer to save their card on Paytm for future payments.
coft.list.text3: Your card will be saved with {cardScheme} as per latest RBI guidelines.
coft.checkbox.error: This card cannot be saved. Please contact your issuing bank.

saveUpiConsent.list.mainheading: Save UPI ID / Number for future payments?
saveUpiConsent.list.text1: Get a collect request with just one tap. For safety, you will still have to enter UPI PIN to complete the payment.
saveUpiConsent.list.GLOBAL.text3: Your UPI ID / Number will be stored with Paytm in an encrypted and secure format, and can be accessed across all Paytm merchants.
saveUpiConsent.list.LOCAL.text3: Your UPI ID / Number will be stored with Paytm in an encrypted and secure format, and can be accessed only on {merchantName}.
saveUpiConsent.consent.checkbox.label: Save this UPI ID/ Mobile No./ UPI No.
